- Description: dao_protocol PR5b+PR5c: /dao/submit_contribution intake + full dispatch routing (Sidekiq logic replicated)
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dao_protocol/pull/38
  
  Details:
  PR5b+PR5c of the Edgar to dao_protocol extraction (the crown jewel intake + dispatch). Ported dao_controller#submit_contribution: POST endpoint that verifies the signature (crypto/verify), sets signature_verification (success/failed/no_signature_format/error), dedups by Request-Transaction-ID via a sqlite replay guard (409 on replay, mirroring the Rails write-unless-exist), appends the signed text to the Telegram Chat Logs ledger synchronously (new sheets/telegram_raw_log.py + base.append_row), and dispatches immediate processing in the background. Replicated the Sidekiq business logic: ported WebhookTriggerWorker (jobs/webhook_trigger.py — GET ?action=, 30s, retry network errors only) and the full 17-branch event-tag to webhook+action routing table (dispatch.py) exactly mirroring trigger_immediate_processing, first-match-wins. 6 dao tests (28 total) pass. Deployed to seni_ror_new:8010; route mounted (GET 405) and verified gate-off (real /dao still on Rails). Webhook URLs and live event testing deferred to the operator-driven ramp (real ledger/GAS). EMAIL onboarding + attachment upload deferred and flagged.
